name: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc.
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. is a leading coffee and beverage company in North America. It operates through two main segments: Coffee Systems, which includes the Keurig hot beverage system, and Beverage Solutions, which encompasses a portfolio of iconic brands such as Dr Pepper, Snapple, and Green Mountain Coffee Roasters. The company offers a wide range of hot and cold beverages for consumers and businesses.
